description_for_human: Multi-source IOC enrichment — auto-detects IP, file hash, or domain and queries IPinfo.io, AbuseIPDB, MalwareBazaar, Google DNS, and URLScan.io simultaneously. Returns a single correlated verdict, confidence score, and recommended action.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to enrich any indicator of compromise (IOC). Invoke enrichIoc when the user provides any IOC and you need to determine if it is malicious — it auto-detects the type (IP, hash, or domain) and returns a verdict with confidence score and recommended action. Use enrichIp for explicit IP address lookups (returns geolocation, ASN, and abuse score), enrichHash for file hash lookups (MD5/SHA1/SHA256 against MalwareBazaar), and enrichDomain for domain lookups (DNS resolution and URLScan.io history). Always prefer enrichIoc unless the user explicitly requests a specific IOC type.
